scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client" "wait-on tcp:5173 tcp:4000 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client && electron-builder
scripts.build:installer: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.build:portable: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client && electron-builder --win portable
